name: movie-recommender-backend
description: Movie recommendation system with ChromaDB vector search — equal weight for age, likes and genre

scripts.start: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run seed && node src/index.js
scripts.stop:all: kill $(lsof -ti:5173) 2>/dev/null; kill $(lsof -ti:3001) 2>/dev/null; docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml down; echo 'All stopped (frontend + backend + docker)'
